title: Introduction to Analogue and Digital Electronics

prerequisites.text: MAM1021F/S (MEC), PHY1013F/S (MEC), PHY1004W or PHY1032S (CSC), MAM1004F (>60%) and MAM1008S (>60%) or MAM1031F and MAM1032S (CSC); DP for EEE2041F.

outline: Topics include: (a) Introduction to semiconductor physics and diode basics; (b) Diode circuit model, applications and LEDs; (c) Introduction to BJTs and basic models; (d) BJT amplifier circuit (common-emitter focus); (e) Introduction to Op Amps, ideal and practical models; (f) Op-amp inverting and non-inverting applications; (g) Introduction to FETs and FET analogue applications; (h) Simple H-bridge circuits; (i) Difference between analogue and digital applications, introduction to digital electronics; (j) Digital electronics continued — Boolean algebra and logic gates; (k) FET digital applications and introduction to Flip Flops; (l) Basics of state machines and electronic instruments.
